name: MeshCheckParameters
summary: Output of a mesh checking operations.

methods.name: Defaults
methods.summary: Gets the default mesh check parameters.

properties.name: CheckForBadNormals
properties.summary: If true, then look for vertex normals that are not unit vectors, are zero length or vary greatly from the general direction of the face normals.

properties.name: CheckForDegenerateFaces
properties.summary: If true, then look for triangles and quads that have zero area and quads where one sub triangle has zero area.

properties.name: CheckForDisjointMeshes
properties.summary: If true, then look for faces in the mesh that are totally isolated from other faces in the mesh. (i.e. an island of faces, or many islands, that have a boundary of naked edges)

properties.name: CheckForDuplicateFaces
properties.summary: If true, then look for faces that have vertexes (not necessarily vertex indexes) that are identical.

properties.name: CheckForExtremelyShortEdges
properties.summary: If true, then look for topological edges where the distance between the endpoints is less than ExtremelyShortEdgeDistance.

properties.name: CheckForInvalidNgons
properties.summary: If true, then look for ngons that have invalid information.

properties.name: CheckForNakedEdges
properties.summary: If true, then look for topological edges in the mesh topology where the face count is 1. Note, this check is also made if CheckForDuplicateFaces is true but the output is not shown if CheckForNakedEdges is false.

properties.name: CheckForNonManifoldEdges
properties.summary: If true, then look for topological edges in the mesh topology where the face count is greater than 2. Note, this check is also made if CheckForDuplicateFaces is true but the output is not shown if CheckForNonManifoldEdges is false.

properties.name: CheckForRandomFaceNormals
properties.summary: If true, then look for adjacent faces that have the same edge orientation. This typically means that clockwise/counterclockwise orientation, and face normal are not in sync.

properties.name: CheckForSelfIntersection
properties.summary: If true, then look for self intersections.

properties.name: CheckForUnusedVertices
properties.summary: If true, then look for vertices that are not referenced by any face in the mesh.

properties.name: DegenerateFaceCount
properties.summary: Gets the total degenerate face count for all meshes.

properties.name: DisjointMeshCount
properties.summary: Gets the total count of disjoint pieces for all meshes.

properties.name: DuplicateFaceCount
properties.summary: Gets the total count of duplicate faces for all meshes.

properties.name: ExtremelyShortEdgeCount
properties.summary: Gets the total number of extremely short edges for all meshes.

properties.name: InvalidNgonCount
properties.summary: Gets the total number of invalid ngons for all meshes.

properties.name: NakedEdgeCount
properties.summary: Gets the total number of naked edges for all meshes.

properties.name: NonManifoldEdgeCount
properties.summary: Gets the total number of non-manifold edges for all meshes.

properties.name: NonUnitVectorNormalCount
properties.summary: Get the total count of normals that are not unit vectors for all meshes.

properties.name: RandomFaceNormalCount
properties.summary: Gets the total count of random face normals for all meshes.

properties.name: SelfIntersectingPairsCount
properties.summary: Gets the total count of self intersections for all meshes.

properties.name: UnusedVertexCount
properties.summary: Gets the total count of unused vertices for all meshes.

properties.name: VertexFaceNormalsDifferCount
properties.summary: Gets the total count of vertex normals that differ greatly from face normals for all meshes.

properties.name: ZeroLengthNormalCount
properties.summary: Gets the total count of zero length normals for all meshes.
